summary: Elric Mervinger, a young wizard, is struggling with his grades and the pressure to live up to his family's legacy. He has just been expelled from VSDON Academy due to consecutive failures in various subjects. Meanwhile, Sean Neresta, an elite student who graduated as second-ranked, tries to help Elric by offering him a chance to join an exploration party to find the Den of a mystical proto-dragon, which might hold the key to curing Elric's disease.
key_moments: Elric fails his exams and gets expelled from VSDON Academy
Sean offers Elric a chance to join an exploration party to find the proto-dragon's Den
The team discovers that the Den might hold the key to curing Elric's disease
